name: SaaS Dashboard / Data Platform
description: Proposal template for SaaS analytics dashboards, data platforms, and business intelligence builds. Covers data ingestion, modeling, visualization, and ongoing platform support.
author: ScopeForge

details.title: SaaS Dashboard & Data Platform Proposal
details.subtitle: End-to-end analytics platform — from ingestion to executive dashboards
details.recommendation: Start with an MVP dashboard focused on your top 3 KPIs, then expand to full self-service analytics.
executiveSummary: Your team spends significant time on manual reporting that could be automated with a purpose-built data platform.
An MVP dashboard delivering your highest-priority KPIs can prove ROI within the first quarter.
We propose a phased approach: discovery sprint → MVP build → full platform expansion.
whatWeHeard: Reporting relies on manual exports and spreadsheet stitching.
Leadership wants real-time visibility into key metrics.
The team needs self-service analytics without engineering bottlenecks.
details.investmentSummary: Total investment ranges from $55K for an MVP dashboard to $95K for the full platform, with clear milestones and acceptance criteria at each phase.

valueProposal.headline: Automate reporting and unlock self-service analytics for your team
valueProposal.narrative: By replacing manual data workflows with a purpose-built dashboard platform, your analysts and operators save hours every week while giving leadership real-time visibility.
unlocks: Automated weekly reporting — eliminate 8+ hours of manual reconciliation
Self-service analytics — empower non-technical stakeholders to answer their own questions
Single source of truth — replace fragmented spreadsheets with a governed data layer

valueSources.label: Weekly reporting automation
valueSources.currentState: Manual exports, spreadsheet formulas, and email distribution each week
valueSources.futureState: Automated pipeline refreshes and scheduled dashboard delivery

valueSources.label: Self-service analytics
valueSources.currentState: Request ad-hoc reports from analysts; wait days for answers
valueSources.futureState: Point-and-click exploration of governed data sets

buildPlan.name: Discovery & data audit
buildPlan.description: Map existing data sources, define KPIs, and design the target schema and dashboard layout.

buildPlan.name: MVP dashboard build
buildPlan.description: Build ETL pipelines and a working dashboard for the top 3 KPIs with live data.

buildPlan.name: Platform expansion & polish
buildPlan.description: Extend to additional data sources, add self-service features, and performance-tune.

buildPlan.name: Handoff & documentation
buildPlan.description: Transfer knowledge, deliver documentation, and set up ongoing support.

actualDeliverables.title: Data architecture & schema
actualDeliverables.description: Complete data model and integration architecture for the analytics platform.

actualDeliverables.title: ETL pipeline
actualDeliverables.description: Automated data ingestion and transformation pipelines.

actualDeliverables.title: Dashboard application
actualDeliverables.description: Interactive dashboards with drill-down, filtering, and export capabilities.

actualDeliverables.title: Documentation & handoff
actualDeliverables.description: Runbooks, admin guides, and training materials for ongoing operations.

pricing.summary: Phased investment with clear deliverables at each milestone. MVP at $55K; full platform at $95K.

terms.paymentTerms: 50% upon contract signing, 25% at MVP delivery, 25% at final handoff.
startConditions: Designated product owner for weekly check-ins
assumptions: Source data is accessible via available APIs or database connections.
Client provides feedback on wireframes within 3 business days.
Scope changes beyond the agreed KPIs are handled via change order.
exclusions: Data source licensing or SaaS subscription costs.
Ongoing infrastructure hosting fees beyond the initial setup period.
Features not listed in the deliverables (e.g., mobile app, ML models).
clientResponsibilities: Provide data system access and credentials.
Review and approve deliverables within 5 business days.
terms.changeControl: Scope changes requested after the discovery sprint are handled via a written change order with updated timeline and pricing.
terms.expiration: This proposal is valid for 30 days from the date of issue.

footer.confidentiality: This proposal is confidential and prepared exclusively for {{COMPANY_NAME}}.
footer.contact: Questions? Reach out to your ScopeForge account team.

nextSteps: Schedule a 30-minute discovery call to review this proposal.
Confirm access to data sources and designate a product owner.
Sign the agreement to kick off the discovery sprint.
